title: Ado Additions
description: An Addon For Miku Additions That Adds New Items Themed Around Ado!
body:
If you have any issues or suggestions, please join our [discord](https://discord.gg/Dmp2dbyNrs). 

> Ado Additions is an add-on for [Miku Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/miku-additions) which adds new discs, a new weapon, a new flower and new achievements based on Ado and her songs.

## New Weapon:

- The Guitar!
  > Has high attack damage with medium attack speed.

## New Flower:

- The Blue Rose!
  > An extinct type of flora found in abandoned structures in the depths of the overworld.

## New Discs:

- Aishite Aishite Aishite ([Aishite](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=U8BlNEKq0r8))
- Magic ([Magic](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=l0WArCNh6G0))
- God-ish ([God-ish](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7i_nc5GGIsI))
- Readymade ([Readymade](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jg09lNupc1s))
- ROCKSTAR ([ROCKSTAR](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hRJpiCZlLX8))
- Sakura Biyori and Time Machine with Hatsune Miku ([Sakura](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nIWZfhpnq6M))
- Show ([Show](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pgXpM4l_MwI))
- Usseewa ([Usseewa](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7JI8XY1Fvto))
- unravel ([unravel](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eZuDklxsaRg))
- 0 ([0](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8vm3Tkv43jw))

## NOTE: None of the music inside the mod was made by any of the members of this project. Please check out the links provided to support the original creator(s).
